title: Betfair Information-Lag Books Scientific Collaboration 27
thesis: Cross external event signals, time-zone maintenance patterns, and book synchronization delays to find stale pricing. This variant fuses ecology/evolution researcher guidance with network/epidemiology researcher, control/rl researcher to test survival pressure, niche competition, and adaptive response to decaying edges; contagion paths, information spread, and lag propagation across correlated books; feedback-aware thresholding and action policies that stay robust under execution drift.
guardrails: No live promotion without human approval.
No credentials or hard caps may be mutated.
